recommendations.title: The Hudsucker Proxy
recommendations.overview: A naive business graduate is installed as president of a manufacturing company as part of a stock scam.

recommendations.title: My Salinger Year
recommendations.overview: A college grad takes a clerical job working for the literary agent of the renowned, reclusive writer J.D. Salinger.

recommendations.title: Amy Schumer: The Leather Special
recommendations.overview: Comic sensation Amy Schumer riffs on sex, dating and the absurdities of fame in a bold and uncensored stand-up set at Denver's Bellco Theater.

recommendations.title: Santa Maradona
recommendations.overview: An aimless college graduate jumping from one job interview to another — killing time in between with his wisecracking and deadbeat room-mate — falls in love with an actress.

recommendations.title: The Graduates
recommendations.overview: Four thirtysomething college students share a flat in Florence: Leonardo pursues beautiful Letizia, Rocco moonlights as a night watchman, Bruno needs to graduate to inherit his father-in-law's business, and Pino dreams of becoming a stand-up comedian

recommendations.title: The Crush
recommendations.overview: A precocious and obsessive teenager develops a crush on a naive writer with harrowing consequences.

recommendations.title: Post Grad
recommendations.overview: Ryden Malby has a master plan. Graduate college, get a great job, hang out with her best friend and find the perfect guy. But her plan spins hilariously out of control when she’s forced to move back home with her eccentric family.

recommendations.title: Ben
recommendations.overview: A lonely boy becomes good friends with Ben, a rat. This rat is also the leader of a pack of vicious killer rats, killing lots of people.

recommendations.title: The Graduate
recommendations.overview: A disillusioned college graduate finds himself torn between his older lover and her daughter.

recommendations.title: The Punch Bowl
recommendations.overview: Writer Johannes Pfeiffer who goes undercover as a student in a high school after his friends told him that he missed out on a great life experience since he was home schooled.
